mapper.select: select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, push_enabled, website_url, birth_date, created_datetime, updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where member_email = #{loginId} or member_phone = #{loginId} and member_password = #{memberPassword} and member_status = 'active'

select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, push_enabled, website_url, birth_date, created_datetime, updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where member_email = #{memberEmail} and member_status = 'active'

select id, member_email, member_password, member_nickname, member_handle, member_phone, member_bio, member_region, member_status, member_role, push_enabled, website_url, birth_date, created_datetime, updated_datetime, last_login_at, member_name from tbl_member where (member_email = #{loginId} or member_phone = #{loginId}) and member_status = 'active'

select id, member_email, member_password, member_handle, member_phone, member_region, member_status, member_role, created_datetime, updated_datetime, member_name from tbl_member where member_handle = #{memberHandle} and member_status = 'active'
